chapter_title.ar: باب التَّسْمِيَةِ وَ التَّحْمِيدِ وَ الدُّعَاءِ عَلَى الطَّعَامِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 47 – The Naming (Bismillah), and the Praising (Al-Hamdulillah), and the supplication upon the meal

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/107)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/107)
text: قَالَ مَنْ ذَكَرَ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ عَلَى الطَّعَامِ لَمْ يُسْأَلْ عَنْ نَعِيمِ ذَلِكَ أَبَداً .

en.hubeali: ‘He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The one who mentions Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic upon the meal would not be Questioned about that Bounty, ever!’
en.sarwar: 6. Through the same chain of narrators as that of the previous Hadith the following is narrated: “He (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ’One who mentions the name of Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, on food, he will never be asked any questions about that blessing.’”
